ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Represent the Academy, but make it hot. Complete Quests to earn cosmetics with the Supernova Academy Quest Pack.</>

<text color="FFFD43FF">Includes:</>
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Represent the Academy, but make it hot. Complete Quests to earn cosmetics with the Supernova Academy Quest Pack.</>

<text color="FFFD43FF">Includes:</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString: <text color="FFFD43FF">V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items in the Shop for Fortnite Battle Royale, LEGO® Fortnite, Fortnite Festival or Rocket Racing, as well as additional content like this season's Battle Pass!</>
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: <text color="FFFD43FF">V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items in the Shop for Fortnite Battle Royale, LEGO® Fortnite, Fortnite Festival or Rocket Racing, as well as additional content like this season's Battle Pass!</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Supernova Academy Quest Bundle:</> Earn a Back Bling, Pickaxe and Outfit as you complete applicable quests!
